title: SDLC-CTRL-0004 SBOM per-service overrides allow-list
description: Per-service override for sbom.rego. Each entry waives specific per-package checks for one package in that service's SBOM. Waivers are additive: a missing, malformed, or expired entry waives nothing, so the policy fails toward non-compliance. Passed to `kosli evaluate trail` merged into --params as data.params.overrides. One file per service, named sbom-overrides.<service>.json, stored alongside the rego.

overrides.description: The allow-list. Empty array means the service takes no overrides.

items.description: Waives one check for one package. To waive more than one check for a package, add one entry per check so each carries its own reason and expiry.

package.description: The SPDX package .name to waive (matched exactly against the distilled facts).

check.description: The single per-package check this entry waives for the package.

reason.description: Why this waiver is justified. Required and non-empty; an entry with no reason waives nothing.

expires.description: YYYY-MM-DD. The waiver is active on or before this date and inactive afterwards, forcing periodic review.
